opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I woke up choking on acid, and my chest is burning so intensely I thought I was having a heart attack.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I woke up 2 hours ago with burning chest and acid coming up after a big late meal — I need to know it's not my heart.

symptom_narrative.onset: 2 hours ago after a large late fatty meal, woke me from sleep
symptom_narrative.character: burning, rising from the stomach to the neck, with sour acid regurgitation
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: intense burning, scared it's my heart
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: behind the breastbone up into the neck
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: sour acid in the mouth, lots of saliva, a chronic night cough and morning hoarseness; NO sweating, no arm/jaw pain, no breathlessness, not brought on by exertion
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: occasional heartburn and non-cardiac chest pain before

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: one dose 30 min ago, partial relief

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; large late fatty meal before bed; anxious about the heart

objective_data_offered.value: burning rises from stomach with sour acid taste, worse lying flat, partly relieved by antacid
no sweating, no arm/jaw pain, not exertional, breathing normal
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-report; cannot exclude cardiac cause remotely
